title: rsa::public_key_der: 512-byte buffer too small for 4096-bit RSA SPKI DER
description: rsa.rs public_key_der allocates 512 bytes and passes max_size=512 to wolfhsm_rsa_export_public_der. A 4096-bit RSA SubjectPublicKeyInfo DER is ~550 bytes (verified: openssl produces 550 bytes). wc_RsaKeyToPublicDer returns BUFFER_E when the buffer is too small, so the call fails for any 4096-bit key. The comment claims 512 bytes is sufficient for 4096-bit keys, which is wrong. Fix: use a buffer of at least 600 bytes, or query required size before allocating.
